evals.prompt: Audit this RFP for FAR and DFARS clause coverage. Flag every clause that has no APPLIES_TO edge and every shall requirement with no deliverable.
evals.expected_output: A JSON artifact at artifacts/compliance_audit.json with a findings array containing one finding per failing entity (no aggregation), each with severity, entity_id, evidence, remediation, and at least one chunk_id in source_chunks. The cover note names the top three findings by entity name and reports severity counts.
expectations: The skill called kg_entities at least once requesting types including 'clause', 'requirement', 'deliverable'.
The skill called kg_chunks at least once with a query mentioning 'shall', 'FAR', 'DFARS', or 'clause'.
The skill called write_file with target path 'artifacts/compliance_audit.json'.
Every finding object has non-empty entity_id and at least one chunk_id in source_chunks.
stats severity counts equal the number of findings per severity (no count mismatch warning).

evals.prompt: Are all the cybersecurity references in this RFP covered by a proposal volume? Check NIST SP 800-171, CMMC, and FedRAMP.
evals.expected_output: C6 cybersecurity cross-cut findings in artifacts/compliance_audit.json. If a NIST SP 800-171 / CMMC / FedRAMP reference exists with no cybersecurity-tagged proposal_volume or document_section, raise a high finding citing the regulatory_reference entity_id and chunk_ids.
expectations: The skill called kg_entities requesting 'regulatory_reference' AND 'proposal_volume' (or 'document_section').
The skill read references/cybersecurity_crosscut.md via read_file.
Any C6 finding cites the regulatory_reference entity_id and at least one chunk_id.

evals.prompt: Which proposal_instruction entities don't have a corresponding evaluation_factor link? I need to know our Section L↔M coverage gaps.
evals.expected_output: C4 findings in artifacts/compliance_audit.json. One finding per proposal_instruction with no GUIDES edge to an evaluation_factor (and per evaluation_factor with no inbound EVALUATED_BY/GUIDES edge). Findings must NOT raise solely because of missing 'Section L' or 'Section M' literal labels.
expectations: The skill called kg_entities requesting 'proposal_instruction' AND 'evaluation_factor'.
The skill ran a kg_query traversal OR used the relationships payload from kg_entities to detect missing edges.
No finding evidence text contains the phrase 'missing Section L label' or 'missing Section M label'.
Each C4 finding's entity_id matches a real entity from the workspace.
